languages.text: {n}Зрачок живого глаза Себериана предельно расширяется, заполняя с собой всю радужку. Себериан склоняется над раненой, сжимая рукоять вновь обретенного меча с такой силой, что агрегаты его бионической руки воют от перегрузки. Сама поза его свидетельствует о крайней степени отчаяния.{/n}

{n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Зрачок живого глаза Себериана предельно расширяется, заполняя с собой всю радужку. Себериан склоняется над раненой, сжимая рукоять вновь обретенного меча с такой силой, что агрегаты его бионической руки воют от перегрузки. Сама поза его свидетельствует о крайней степени отчаяния.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's living eye dilates to its utmost, swallowing the entire iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest desperation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安那只有机肉眼的瞳孔骤然扩张到极限，几乎撑满了虹膜。他俯身靠近受伤的女人，死死攥着刚夺回的长剑剑柄，力道大得仿生手臂的组件都发出了不堪重负的尖鸣。他整个人的姿态，都流露出最深沉的绝望。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安那只有机肉眼的瞳孔骤然扩张到极限，几乎撑满了虹膜。他俯身靠近受伤的女人，死死攥着刚夺回的长剑剑柄，力道大得仿生手臂的组件都发出了不堪重负的尖鸣。他整个人的姿态，都流露出最深沉的绝望。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La pupila del ojo orgánico de Seberian se dilata al máximo, llenando casi el iris. Seberian se inclina sobre la mujer herida, sujetando la empuñadura de su recién recuperada espada con suficiente fuerza como para que los componentes de su brazo biónico giman. Puedes ver en su postura la más absoluta desesperación.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La pupila del ojo orgánico de Seberian se dilata al máximo, llenando casi el iris. Seberian se inclina sobre la mujer herida, sujetando la empuñadura de su recién recuperada espada con suficiente fuerza como para que los componentes de su brazo biónico giman. Puedes ver en su postura la más absoluta desesperación.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La pupille organique de Seberian se dilate, jusqu'à recouvrir presque tout l'iris. Seberian se penche sur la femme blessée, agrippant la poignée de son épée récemment retrouvée avec une telle force que les composants de son bras bioniques hurlent sous la pression. Sa posture exprime le désespoir le plus profond.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La pupille organique de Seberian se dilate, jusqu'à recouvrir presque tout l'iris. Seberian se penche sur la femme blessée, agrippant la poignée de son épée récemment retrouvée avec une telle force que les composants de son bras bioniques hurlent sous la pression. Sa posture exprime le désespoir le plus profond.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın organik gözünün bebeği, irisini neredeyse tamamen dolduracak kadar genişliyor. Seberian, yaralı kadının üzerine eğiliyor ve yeni bulduğu kılıcının kabzasını o kadar sıkı kavrıyor ki biyonik kolunun bileşenleri zorlanmadan dolayı uğulduyor. Duruşu bile en derin çaresizliği anlatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın organik gözünün bebeği, irisini neredeyse tamamen dolduracak kadar genişliyor. Seberian, yaralı kadının üzerine eğiliyor ve yeni bulduğu kılıcının kabzasını o kadar sıkı kavrıyor ki biyonik kolunun bileşenleri zorlanmadan dolayı uğulduyor. Duruşu bile en derin çaresizliği anlatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Pupille von Seberians organischem Auge weitet sich und scheint die gesamte Iris auszufüllen. Seberian beugt sich über die verwundete Frau und umfasst den Griff seines gerade wiedergewonnenen Schwertes so fest, dass die Komponenten seines bionischen Arms aufstöhnen. Seine Haltung spiegelt tiefe Verzweiflung wider.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pupil of Seberian's organic eye dilates to its utmost, almost filling the iris. Seberian leans over the wounded woman, gripping the hilt of his newly recovered sword with such force that the components of his bionic arm howl with the strain. His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Pupille von Seberians organischem Auge weitet sich und scheint die gesamte Iris auszufüllen. Seine Haltung spiegelt tiefe Verzweiflung wider.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンの有機眼の瞳は最大限に広がり、虹彩をほぼ満たす。傷ついた女に寄り添うセベリアンの姿は、深い絶望を物語る。彼のバイオニックアームは、剣の柄を握る力に耐えかねて唸り声を上げている。{/n}

His very posture speaks of the deepest despair.{/n}
